data.description: You can use a crystal ball or another object to see and hear the subject from a distance, as long as you have seen it within the last six months. You can also attempt to teleport to a familiar location if that place no longer exists.

Casting Time: action
Range: Unlimited
Components: V,S, M (a pair of linked rings of silver)
Duration: hours

This spell transports you or a willing creature of your choice to a destination you select. The target must be on the same plane as you. If the target is within 180 feet, it appears at a point of your choosing within 5 feet of the target. If the target is more than 180 feet away, it must be within range of the spell (which can be up to half the spell’s maximum distance). You select the destination, which must exist and must be on the same plane as you. The target teleports to a similar area: a city might appear in another city with a comparable layout, or a laboratory might appear at another wizard's laboratory that has many of the same tools and implements.

This instantly transports you and up to eight willing creatures or a single object that you can see within range, or a target object inside a 10-foot cube, to a destination you select. You must be able to entirely fit the target object inside a cube, and can't hold or carry an unwilling creature.
You know the target well enough to avoid many simple traps and hazards.
